item.description: El delantero del Inter de Milan le dio la ventaja a la Albiceleste en los últimos minutos para meter a Argentina en la Gran Final.

media:content.media:title: ¡Se desata la locura! Lautaro Martínez marca el 2-1 ante Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: El delantero del Inter de Milan le dio la ventaja a la Albiceleste en los últimos minutos para meter a Argentina en la Gran Final.

item.title: ¡Se desata la locura! Lautaro Martínez marca el 2-1 ante Inglaterra

item.dc:creator: Katrina Tudlong
item.description: The World Cup has provided a welcome boost to England’s pubs with millions more pints sold. But the industry is ailing and many are facing closure.

media:content.media:text: Football Fans Watch England V Mexico In The FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: England soccer supporters celebrate during the World Cup match against Mexico earlier this month.

media:content.media:text: England WCup Soccer Reaction
media:content.media:description: England soccer supporters celebrate during the World Cup match against Mexico earlier this month.

media:content.media:text: BRITAIN-FBL-WC-2026-FANS
media:content.media:description: England soccer supporters celebrate during the World Cup match against Mexico earlier this month.

media:content.media:text: On-field action during a World Cup match.
media:content.media:description: England soccer supporters celebrate during the World Cup match against Mexico earlier this month.

item.title: Thirsty England fans could down an extra 6 million pints during semifinal clash

item.description: Tras eliminar a Inglaterra en semifinales, Argentina estalla en celebración al avanzar por segunda vez consecutiva a la final. Los ingleses se paran devastados frente a su afición, mientras Messi lidera los festejos albicelestes.

media:content.media:title: Messi festeja frente a una Inglaterra devastada
media:content.media:description: Tras eliminar a Inglaterra en semifinales, Argentina estalla en celebración al avanzar por segunda vez consecutiva a la final. Los ingleses se paran devastados frente a su afición, mientras Messi lidera los festejos albicelestes.

item.title: Messi festeja frente a una Inglaterra devastada

item.description: Lautaro Martínez fue una de las figuras de la semifinal donde Argentina venció a Inglaterra, ya que el delantero logró el gol del triunfo en los últimos minutos tras una asistencia de Messi. En sus declaraciones, no pudo evitar llegar hasta las lágrimas.

media:content.media:title: Lautaro Martínez, conmovido tras pasar a la final: “Siempre soñé con hacer este gol”
media:content.media:description: Lautaro Martínez fue una de las figuras de la semifinal donde Argentina venció a Inglaterra, ya que el delantero logró el gol del triunfo en los últimos minutos tras una asistencia de Messi. En sus declaraciones, no pudo evitar llegar hasta las lágrimas.

item.title: Lautaro Martínez, conmovido tras pasar a la final: “Siempre soñé con hacer este gol”

item.description: Argentina venció 2-1 a Inglaterra en una histórica semifinal donde remontaron el partido. Al finalizar las acciones, Scaloni se deshizo en elogios para sus jugadores y su afición, destacando el enorme trabajo que han tenido todos para volver a la final.

media:content.media:title: Scaloni celebra el pase de Argentina a la final: “Somos únicos”
media:content.media:description: Argentina venció 2-1 a Inglaterra en una histórica semifinal donde remontaron el partido. Al finalizar las acciones, Scaloni se deshizo en elogios para sus jugadores y su afición, destacando el enorme trabajo que han tenido todos para volver a la final.

item.title: Scaloni celebra el pase de Argentina a la final: “Somos únicos”

item.description: Scaloni esconde una sonrisa tras la épica reacción de Argentina. Tras ir abajo, Fernández firmó el empate y, siete minutos después, Lautaro Martínez anotó el gol que le dio la vuelta a la semifinal, desatando la contenida alegría del técnico.

media:content.media:title: Scaloni suelta una pequeña risa tras el desempate de Argentina
media:content.media:description: Scaloni esconde una sonrisa tras la épica reacción de Argentina. Tras ir abajo, Fernández firmó el empate y, siete minutos después, Lautaro Martínez anotó el gol que le dio la vuelta a la semifinal, desatando la contenida alegría del técnico.

item.title: Scaloni suelta una pequeña risa tras el desempate de Argentina

item.description: El delantero del Inter de Milan le dio la ventaja a la Albiceleste en los últimos minutos para meter a Argentina en la Gran Final.

media:content.media:title: ¡Se desata la locura! Lautaro Martínez marca el 2-1 ante Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: El delantero del Inter de Milan le dio la ventaja a la Albiceleste en los últimos minutos para meter a Argentina en la Gran Final.

item.title: ¡Se desata la locura! Lautaro Martínez marca el 2-1 ante Inglaterra

item.description: El mediocampista argentino disparó para vencer a Jordan Pickford e igualar el encuentro 1-1 en una emocionante Semifinal de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

media:content.media:title: Enzo Fernández anota el empate para Argentina y Antonela Roccuzzo lo festeja en grande
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista argentino disparó para vencer a Jordan Pickford e igualar el encuentro 1-1 en una emocionante Semifinal de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

item.title: Enzo Fernández anota el empate para Argentina y Antonela Roccuzzo lo festeja en grande

item.description: Emiliamo Martínez no pudo hacer nada ante la llegada del futbolista inglés que definió como crack para abrir el marcador en la Semifinal de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Anthony Gordon para el 1-0 de Inglaterra ante Argentina: ENORME jugada colectiva
media:content.media:description: Emiliamo Martínez no pudo hacer nada ante la llegada del futbolista inglés que definió como crack para abrir el marcador en la Semifinal de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Gol de Anthony Gordon para el 1-0 de Inglaterra ante Argentina: ENORME jugada colectiva

item.description: Inglaterra afila las garras para estar cara a cara con Argentina. Harry Kane y Jude Bellingham lideran a los ingleses que buscan terminar con una larga sequía sin títulos.

media:content.media:title: Los Tres Leones se preparan para enfrentar a Argentina, Kane y Bellingham calientan motores
media:content.media:description: Inglaterra afila las garras para estar cara a cara con Argentina. Harry Kane y Jude Bellingham lideran a los ingleses que buscan terminar con una larga sequía sin títulos.

item.title: Los Tres Leones se preparan para enfrentar a Argentina, Kane y Bellingham calientan motores

item.description: El entrenador de la selección inglesa se refirió a la semifinal contra Argentina como 'un juego soñado' y habló de los cambios en el once para enfrentar al campeón vigente, y la estrategia que tendrán para buscar la victoria.

media:content.media:title: Thomas Tuchel: "Estos son los partidos con los que soñamos y queremos jugar"
media:content.media:description: El entrenador de la selección inglesa se refirió a la semifinal contra Argentina como 'un juego soñado' y habló de los cambios en el once para enfrentar al campeón vigente, y la estrategia que tendrán para buscar la victoria.

item.title: Thomas Tuchel: "Estos son los partidos con los que soñamos y queremos jugar"

item.description: El arquero, Juan Musso, destaca la importancia de buscar la victoria para darle una alegría más a la afición ‘albiceleste’ y afirma que el equipo peleará por el mejor resultado hasta el último minuto, como siempre.

media:content.media:title: Musso: “No nos vamos a caer si las cosas no arrancan como queremos”
media:content.media:description: El arquero, Juan Musso, destaca la importancia de buscar la victoria para darle una alegría más a la afición ‘albiceleste’ y afirma que el equipo peleará por el mejor resultado hasta el último minuto, como siempre.

item.title: Musso: “No nos vamos a caer si las cosas no arrancan como queremos”

item.description: In the wake of two fatal ICE-involved shootings in less than a week, the Department of Homeland Security is now instructing agents to suspend most vehicle stops amid growing uproar. On Truth Social, President Donald Trump wrote, “We cannot give up one of ICE’s most important and effective crime fighting tools,” adding, “it won’t happen on my watch.” NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: ICE Halts Most Vehicle Stops After Fatal Texas, Maine Shootings
media:content.media:description: In the wake of two fatal ICE-involved shootings in less than a week, the Department of Homeland Security is now instructing agents to suspend most vehicle stops amid growing uproar. On Truth Social, President Donald Trump wrote, “We cannot give up one of ICE’s most important and effective crime fighting tools,” adding, “it won’t happen on my watch.” NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY.

item.title: ICE Halts Most Vehicle Stops After Fatal Texas, Maine Shootings

item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced questions from senators on the handling of the Epstein files, crime statistics and a Trump settlement with the IRS during his confirmation hearing to permanently serve in the position. NBC News' Julie Tsirkin reports from Capitol Hill on what lawmakers highlighted in their questioning.

media:content.media:title: Blanche questioned on Epstein files, crime and IRS settlement in confirmation hearing
media:content.media:description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced questions from senators on the handling of the Epstein files, crime statistics and a Trump settlement with the IRS during his confirmation hearing to permanently serve in the position. NBC News' Julie Tsirkin reports from Capitol Hill on what lawmakers highlighted in their questioning.

item.title: Blanche questioned on Epstein files, crime and IRS settlement in confirmation hearing

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
item.description: House Republicans kicked off their plans for a third reconciliation bill for $90 billion in new money for the military during the Iran war and election-related measures.

media:content.media:text: Mike Johnson.
media:content.media:description: Speaker of the House Mike Johnson, R-La., on July 14 in Washington, D.C.

item.title: House Republicans push for $95B for Iran war, election measures and farm aid

item.dc:creator: Dan De Luce
item.description: Trump’s nominee for director of national intelligence, Jay Clayton, struggled to answer questions from Democratic lawmakers that could put him at odds with the president.

media:content.media:text: Senate Holds Confirmation Hearing For Jay Clayton To Be Director of National Intelligence
media:content.media:description: Jay Clayton appears before the Senate Intelligence Committee during his nomination hearing Wednesday.

item.title: Trump’s intelligence nominee hedges when asked about the 2020 election

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
item.description: GOP Rep. Thomas Massie’s measure to cut off U.S. assistance to Israel sparked a rare division between the chamber’s top two Democrats: Hakeem Jeffries and Katherine Clark.

media:content.media:text: An Israeli strike on an industrial area in Gaza City on July 12, 2026.
media:content.media:description: An Israeli strike Sunday on an industrial area in Gaza City.

media:content.media:text: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., leaves the Capitol in June.
media:content.media:description: An Israeli strike Sunday on an industrial area in Gaza City.

item.title: House Democratic leaders split over U.S. aid to Israel as public opinion shifts

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: In today’s edition, our Capitol Hill team dives into the latest disagreement among Democrats over Israel. Plus, Andrea Mitchell examines whether Ukraine can build on the advantages it has developed in the war with Russia.

media:content.media:text: From left, Hakeem Jeffries, and Katherine Clark stand next to one another, then the frame is divided into a reflection of them both on the other side
media:content.media:description: House Democratic leaders Hakeem Jeffries and Katherine Clark diverged on an Israel aid vote.

item.title: Democrats’ deepening Israel divisions: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Chloe Atkins
item.description: Indian business magnate Gautam Adani said his pledge to invest billions of dollars in the U.S. did not influence the Justice Department’s decision to move to drop the criminal case against him.

media:content.media:text: Side profile of Gautam Adani
media:content.media:description: Gautam Adani, chairman of Adani Group, in 2023.

item.title: Indian billionaire denies U.S. investment pledge influenced DOJ to seek case dismissal

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
Mosheh Gains
item.description: The U.S. military will begin testing the testosterone levels of some service members and recommending hormone therapy if needed, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NATO Summit In Ankara
media:content.media:description: Pete Hegseth, U.S. Secretary of War, during the 2026 NATO Ankara Summit in Ankara, Turkey, on July 8th, 2026.

item.title: U.S. military will test service members’ testosterone levels, Pete Hegseth says

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
item.description: GOP Rep. Thomas Massie’s measure to cut off U.S. assistance to Israel sparked a rare division between the chamber’s top two Democrats: Hakeem Jeffries and Katherine Clark.

media:content.media:text: An Israeli strike on an industrial area in Gaza City on July 12, 2026.
media:content.media:description: An Israeli strike Sunday on an industrial area in Gaza City.

media:content.media:text: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., leaves the Capitol in June.

item.title: House Democratic leaders split over U.S. aid to Israel as public opinion shifts

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
item.description: House Republicans kicked off their plans for a third reconciliation bill for $90 billion in new money for the military during the Iran war and election-related measures.

media:content.media:text: Mike Johnson.

item.title: House Republicans push for $95B for Iran war, election measures and farm aid

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Hair oil and scalp oil aren’t interchangeable. Hairstylists and trichologists explain the difference, how to use each one and their top product picks.

media:content.media:text: Hair oil tends to be thicker, whereas scalp oil is usually lightweight to prevent your roots from looking greasy.
media:content.media:description: Hair oil tends to be thicker, whereas scalp oil is usually lightweight to prevent your roots from looking greasy.

media:content.media:text: Hair oil tends to be thicker, whereas scalp oil is usually lightweight to prevent your roots from looking greasy.
media:content.media:description: Hair oil tends to be thicker, whereas scalp oil is usually lightweight to prevent your roots from looking greasy.

item.title: Hair oil and scalp oil are not the same thing — here’s what experts want you to know

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: I tested the Thirdlove TempSync T-Shirt Bra for a year to see if it’s actually cooling, quick-drying and helps prevent boob sweat. Here are my honest thoughts, plus sizing tips.

media:content.media:text: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.
media:content.media:description: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.

media:content.media:text: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.
media:content.media:description: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.

media:content.media:text: A woman standing outside and wearing a black tank top.
media:content.media:description: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.

media:content.media:text: A close-up image of the inside of a cup on the Thirdlove TempSync T-Shirt Bra, showing the tiny perforations in the nude-colored material.
media:content.media:description: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.

media:content.media:text: An image of the back of a black Thirdlove TempSync T-Shirt Bra with the straps straight (left) and crossback (right).
media:content.media:description: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.

media:content.media:text: Two Thirdlove TempSync T-Shirt Bras on black hangers, one on top of the other: top (black) and bottom (nude)
media:content.media:description: Thirdlove’s TempSync T-Shirt Bra doesn’t hold onto heat or moisture unlike most of other lined options, and it gives my 36D chest the lift and shape I look for.

item.title: Is Thirdlove’s cooling bra actually cooling? I tested it for over a year to find out
